description: Configuration keywords for plot item types created via 'plot item create <type>'. These keywords are appended after the item type to control appearance, coloring, clipping, and legend.

items.name: ball
items.description: Ball (particle) visualization with coloring by attribute, arrow shape, and cut planes
items.common_use: Visualize particles colored by velocity, displacement, force, group, etc.

items.name: wall
items.description: Wall visualization with transparency, coloring, and cut planes
items.common_use: Visualize boundaries with adjustable transparency and coloring

items.name: clump
items.description: Clump (rigid cluster) visualization with coloring by attribute, arrow shape, transparency, and cut planes
items.common_use: Visualize clumps colored by velocity, displacement, volume, group, etc.

items.name: contact
items.description: Contact visualization with force scaling, property coloring, and cut planes
items.common_use: Visualize contact forces, types, or model properties

items.name: rblock
items.description: Rigid block visualization with coloring by attribute, cut planes, and legend display
items.common_use: Visualize rigid blocks colored by velocity, displacement, volume, group, etc.

shared_keywords.description: Keywords common to most plot item types

notes: Keywords are appended directly after 'plot item create <type>'
Multiple keywords can be combined in a single command
These keywords are not officially documented; derived from working patterns
